input: 近7天低打标率策略按单策略维度和风险域维度分P0/P1/P2/notice的情况

sql_by_level.notice:
SELECT
  '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
  'notice' AS severity_level,
  3 AS severity_priority,
  cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
  cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
  cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
  cur.data_days AS data_days,
  cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
  cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
  cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
  cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
  cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

  0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
  0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
  0.0 AS growth_rate,
  0.0 AS daily_delta,
  'notice_low_label_rate' AS hit_rule_id,
  '近7天三维粒度打标率<10%，不限制累计进审量' AS hit_condition
FROM (SELECT
  mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
  strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
  strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
  MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
  SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
  SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
  if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    multiIf(
      not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
      '不良行为或争议价值观',
      '侵犯未成年权益',
      '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
      '党和国家形象负面',
      '危险行为',
      '国家安全',
      '引人不适',
      '指令舆情相关',
      '短期策略迁移',
      '色情性化',
      '违法违规',
      '领导人'
    ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
) daily
GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
WHERE (cur.label_rate < 0.1)
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000
sql_by_level.P2:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
    'P2' AS severity_level,
    2 AS severity_priority,
    cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
    cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
    cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
    0.0 AS growth_rate,
    0.0 AS daily_delta,
    'p2_single_strategy_low_efficiency' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近7天日均进审量>2000且打标率<3%' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
    strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
    strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      multiIf(
        not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
        position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
        position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
        position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
        '（空/机审一级标签）'
      ) AS mach_root_label_key,
      ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
      AND `[p_date]` < today()
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
  WHERE (cur.avg_review_in_cnt > 2000 AND cur.label_rate < 0.03)
UNION ALL
  SELECT
    '风险域维度' AS warning_dimension,
    'P2' AS severity_level,
    2 AS severity_priority,
    cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
    cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
    cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.prev_label_rate AS prev_label_rate,
    cur.growth_rate AS growth_rate,
    cur.daily_delta AS daily_delta,
    'p2_risk_domain_low_efficiency_growth' AS hit_rule_id,
    '风险域下低效策略汇总日均进审量环比上涨>20%，日均增量>2000，上期进审量>0' AS hit_condition
  FROM (
    WITH
    cur_low_keys AS (
      SELECT mach_root_label_name, strategy_id, strategy_name
      FROM (SELECT
    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
    strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
    strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,

    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      multiIf(
        not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
        ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
        position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
        position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
        position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
        '（空/机审一级标签）'
      ) AS mach_root_label_key,
      ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur_strategy
      WHERE label_rate < 0.1
    ),
    prev_low_keys AS (

      FROM (SELECT
    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
    strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,

    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,

    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,

    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (

      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (

  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7

    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) cur_daily
      INNER JOIN cur_low_keys
        ON cur_daily.mach_root_label_key = cur_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND cur_daily.strategy_id_key = cur_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND cur_daily.strategy_name_key = cur_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY cur_daily.mach_root_label_key
    ),
    prev_domain AS (
      SELECT
        prev_daily.mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
        SUM(prev_daily.jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT prev_daily.dt) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
        if(SUM(prev_daily.wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(prev_daily.da_biao) / SUM(prev_daily.wan_shen)) AS prev_label_rate
      FROM (SELECT

    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.2 AND cur.daily_delta > 2000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.3 AND cur.daily_delta > 5000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

sql_by_level.notice:
SELECT
  '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
  'notice' AS severity_level,
  3 AS severity_priority,
  cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
  cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
  cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
  cur.data_days AS data_days,
  cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
  cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
  cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
  cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
  cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

  0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
  0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
  0.0 AS growth_rate,
  0.0 AS daily_delta,
  'notice_low_label_rate' AS hit_rule_id,
  '近7天三维粒度打标率<10%，不限制累计进审量' AS hit_condition
FROM (SELECT
  mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
  strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
  strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
  MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
  SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
  SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
  if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    multiIf(
      not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
      '不良行为或争议价值观',
      '侵犯未成年权益',
      '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
      '党和国家形象负面',
      '危险行为',
      '国家安全',
      '引人不适',
      '指令舆情相关',
      '短期策略迁移',
      '色情性化',
      '违法违规',
      '领导人'
    ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
) daily
GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
WHERE (cur.label_rate < 0.1)
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000
sql_by_level.P2:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
    'P2' AS severity_level,
    2 AS severity_priority,
    cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
    cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
    cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,

      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.2 AND cur.daily_delta > 2000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.prev_label_rate AS prev_label_rate,
    cur.growth_rate AS growth_rate,
    cur.daily_delta AS daily_delta,
    'p1_risk_domain_low_efficiency_volume_spike' AS hit_rule_id,
    '风险域下低效策略汇总日均进审量环比上涨>30%，日均增量>5000，上期进审量>0' AS hit_condition
  FROM (
    WITH
    cur_low_keys AS (
      SELECT mach_root_label_name, strategy_id, strategy_name
      FROM (SELECT
    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
    strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
    strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,

    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      multiIf(
        not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,

    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'

      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',

        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur_strategy
      WHERE label_rate < 0.1
    ),

    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'

      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')

      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (

    GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) prev_strategy

    ),
    cur_domain AS (

      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'

  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) cur_daily
      INNER JOIN cur_low_keys

      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.3 AND cur.daily_delta > 5000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
    'P0' AS severity_level,
    0 AS severity_priority,
    cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
    cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
    cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    w2.avg_review_in_cnt AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    w2.label_rate AS prev_label_rate,
    0.0 AS growth_rate,
    0.0 AS daily_delta,
    'p0_four_week_persistent_low_efficiency' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近1周日均进审>2000且连续4周打标率<3%' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,

    ) AS mach_root_label_key,

    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'

        '不良行为或争议价值观',

      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) cur_daily
      INNER JOIN cur_low_keys
        ON cur_daily.mach_root_label_key = cur_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND cur_daily.strategy_id_key = cur_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND cur_daily.strategy_name_key = cur_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY cur_daily.mach_root_label_key
    ),
    prev_domain AS (
      SELECT
        prev_daily.mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
        SUM(prev_daily.jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT prev_daily.dt) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
        if(SUM(prev_daily.wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(prev_daily.da_biao) / SUM(prev_daily.wan_shen)) AS prev_label_rate
      FROM (SELECT
    multiIf(
      not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.5 AND cur.daily_delta > 10000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

sql_by_level.notice:
SELECT
  '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
  'notice' AS severity_level,
  3 AS severity_priority,
  cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
  cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
  cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
  cur.data_days AS data_days,
  cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
  cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
  cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
  cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
  cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

  0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
  0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
  0.0 AS growth_rate,
  0.0 AS daily_delta,
  'notice_low_label_rate' AS hit_rule_id,
  '近7天三维粒度打标率<10%，不限制累计进审量' AS hit_condition
FROM (SELECT
  mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
  strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
  strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
  MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
  SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,

      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',

    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'

    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')

      '引人不适',

      '短期策略迁移',
      '色情性化',
      '违法违规',
      '领导人'
    ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
) daily
GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
WHERE (cur.label_rate < 0.1)
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000
sql_by_level.P2:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,
    'P2' AS severity_level,
    2 AS severity_priority,
    cur.mach_root_label_name AS mach_root_label_name,
    cur.strategy_id AS strategy_id,
    cur.strategy_name AS strategy_name,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.max_data_date AS max_data_date,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
    0.0 AS growth_rate,
    0.0 AS daily_delta,
    'p2_single_strategy_low_efficiency' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近7天日均进审量>2000且打标率<3%' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
    strategy_id_key AS strategy_id,
    strategy_name_key AS strategy_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    MAX(dt) AS max_data_date,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT

      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.2 AND cur.daily_delta > 2000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur

    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7

    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'

  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di

    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'

    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (

        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.3 AND cur.daily_delta > 5000)

ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000

FROM (
  SELECT
    '单策略维度' AS warning_dimension,

    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,

    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,

    0.0 AS growth_rate,
    0.0 AS daily_delta,
    'p0_four_week_persistent_low_efficiency' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近1周日均进审>2000且连续4周打标率<3%' AS hit_condition

    mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) prev_strategy
      WHERE label_rate < 0.1
    ),
    cur_domain AS (
      SELECT
        cur_daily.mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
        '' AS strategy_id,
        '' AS strategy_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cur_daily.dt) AS data_days,
        MAX(cur_daily.dt) AS max_data_date,
        SUM(cur_daily.jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
        SUM(cur_daily.wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
        SUM(cur_daily.da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
        SUM(cur_daily.jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT cur_daily.dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
        SUM(cur_daily.wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT cur_daily.dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
        SUM(cur_daily.da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT cur_daily.dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
        if(SUM(cur_daily.wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(cur_daily.da_biao) / SUM(cur_daily.wan_shen)) AS label_rate
      FROM (SELECT
    multiIf(
      not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) cur_daily
      INNER JOIN cur_low_keys
        ON cur_daily.mach_root_label_key = cur_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND cur_daily.strategy_id_key = cur_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND cur_daily.strategy_name_key = cur_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY cur_daily.mach_root_label_key
    ),
    prev_domain AS (
      SELECT
        prev_daily.mach_root_label_key AS mach_root_label_name,
        SUM(prev_daily.jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT prev_daily.dt) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
        if(SUM(prev_daily.wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(prev_daily.da_biao) / SUM(prev_daily.wan_shen)) AS prev_label_rate
      FROM (SELECT
    multiIf(
      not isNull(`[机审一级标签]`) AND `[机审一级标签]` != '', `[机审一级标签]`,
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高价值-兜底vv进审', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '短视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '非白名单政媒账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '商业化付费视频全人审ugc', '商业化',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '白名单账号投稿vv大于5万vv送审', '政媒',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '中视频-特殊账号-达到VV阈值', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '星图预审35wvv强制召回', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】麒麟芯片9030', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【ZL推人】涉日股市负面-词', '指令舆情相关',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '高热虐猫虐狗上升召回-内容现象', '高热',
      ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '') = '【兜底送审】普通视频豁免25W进审', '高热',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), 'ZL') > 0, '指令舆情相关',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '商业化') > 0, '商业化',
      position(ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, ''), '政媒') > 0, '政媒',
      '（空/机审一级标签）'
    ) AS mach_root_label_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_id]`, '（空/strategy_id）') AS strategy_id_key,
    ifNull(`[strategy_name]`, '（空/strategy_name）') AS strategy_name_key,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
    AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` = '' OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
  GROUP BY mach_root_label_key, strategy_id_key, strategy_name_key, dt) prev_daily
      INNER JOIN prev_low_keys
        ON prev_daily.mach_root_label_key = prev_low_keys.mach_root_label_name
       AND prev_daily.strategy_id_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_id
       AND prev_daily.strategy_name_key = prev_low_keys.strategy_name
      GROUP BY prev_daily.mach_root_label_key
    )
    SELECT
      cur_domain.*,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
      ifNull(prev_domain.prev_label_rate, 0) AS prev_label_rate,
      if(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt = 0 OR isNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt), 0,
        (cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt)
        / prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt
      ) AS growth_rate,
      cur_domain.avg_review_in_cnt - ifNull(prev_domain.prev_avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS daily_delta
    FROM cur_domain
    LEFT JOIN prev_domain ON cur_domain.mach_root_label_name = prev_domain.mach_root_label_name
  ) cur
  WHERE (cur.prev_avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND cur.growth_rate > 0.5 AND cur.daily_delta > 10000)
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 50000
